레위기 23:2.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘The set feasts of Yahweh, which you shall proclaim to be holy convocations, even these are my set feasts.

레위기 23:3.content: “ ‘Six days shall work be done, but on the seventh day is a Sabbath of solemn rest, a holy convocation; you shall do no kind of work. It is a Sabbath to Yahweh in all your dwellings.

레위기 23:4.content: “ ‘These are the set feasts of Yahweh, even holy convocations, which you shall proclaim in their appointed season.

레위기 23:5.content: In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month in the evening, is Yahweh’s Passover.

레위기 23:6.content: On the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of unleavened bread to Yahweh. Seven days you shall eat unleavened bread.

레위기 23:7.content: In the first day you shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work.

레위기 23:8.content: But you shall offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh seven days. In the seventh day is a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work.’ ”

레위기 23:10.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘When you have come into the land which I give to you, and shall reap its harvest, then you shall bring the sheaf of the first fruits of your harvest to the priest.

레위기 23:11.content: He shall wave the sheaf before Yahweh, to be accepted for you. On the next day after the Sabbath the priest shall wave it.

레위기 23:12.content: On the day when you wave the sheaf, you shall offer a male lamb without defect a year old for a burnt offering to Yahweh.

레위기 23:13.content: The meal offering with it shall be two tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, an offering made by fire to Yahweh for a pleasant aroma; and the drink offering with it shall be of wine, the fourth part of a hin.

레위기 23:14.content: You must not eat bread, or roasted grain, or fresh grain, until this same day, until you have brought the offering of your God. This is a statute forever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

레위기 23:15.content: “ ‘You shall count from the next day after the Sabbath, from the day that you brought the sheaf of the wave offering: seven Sabbaths shall be completed.

레위기 23:16.content: The next day after the seventh Sabbath you shall count fifty days; and you shall offer a new meal offering to Yahweh.

레위기 23:17.content: You shall bring out of your habitations two loaves of bread for a wave offering made of two tenths of an ephah of fine flour. They shall be baked with yeast, for first fruits to Yahweh.

레위기 23:18.content: You shall present with the bread seven lambs without defect a year old, one young bull, and two rams. They shall be a burnt offering to Yahweh, with their meal offering and their drink offerings, even an offering made by fire, of a sweet aroma to Yahweh.

레위기 23:19.content: You shall offer one male goat for a sin offering, and two male lambs a year old for a sacrifice of peace offerings.

레위기 23:20.content: The priest shall wave them with the bread of the first fruits for a wave offering before Yahweh, with the two lambs. They shall be holy to Yahweh for the priest.

레위기 23:21.content: You shall make proclamation on the same day that there shall be a holy convocation to you. You shall do no regular work. This is a statute forever in all your dwellings throughout your generations.

레위기 23:22.content: “ ‘When you reap the harvest of your land, you must not wholly reap into the corners of your field, and you must not gather the gleanings of your harvest. You must leave them for the poor, and for the foreigner. I am Yahweh your God.’ ”

레위기 23:24.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, saying, ‘In the seventh month, on the first day of the month, there shall be a solemn rest for you, a memorial of blowing of trumpets, a holy convocation.

레위기 23:25.content: You shall do no regular work. You shall offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh.’ ”

레위기 23:27.content: “However on the tenth day of this seventh month is the day of atonement. It shall be a holy convocation to you. You shall afflict yourselves and you shall offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh.

레위기 23:28.content: You shall do no kind of work in that same day, for it is a day of atonement, to make atonement for you before Yahweh your God.

레위기 23:29.content: For whoever it is who shall not deny himself in that same day shall be cut off from his people.

레위기 23:30.content: Whoever does any kind of work in that same day, I will destroy that person from among his people.

레위기 23:31.content: You shall do no kind of work: it is a statute forever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

레위기 23:32.content: It shall be a Sabbath of solemn rest for you, and you shall deny yourselves. In the ninth day of the month at evening, from evening to evening, you shall keep your Sabbath.”

레위기 23:34.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, and say, ‘On the fifteenth day of this seventh month is the feast of booths for seven days to Yahweh.

레위기 23:35.content: On the first day shall be a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work.

레위기 23:36.content: Seven days you shall offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh. On the eighth day shall be a holy convocation to you. You shall offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh. It is a solemn assembly; you shall do no regular work.

레위기 23:37.content: “ ‘These are the appointed feasts of Yahweh which you shall proclaim to be holy convocations, to offer an offering made by fire to Yahweh, a burnt offering, a meal offering, a sacrifice, and drink offerings, each on its own day—

레위기 23:38.content: in addition to the Sabbaths of Yahweh, and in addition to your gifts, and in addition to all your vows, and in addition to all your free will offerings, which you give to Yahweh.

레위기 23:39.content: “ ‘So on the fifteenth day of the seventh month, when you have gathered in the fruits of the land, you shall keep the feast of Yahweh seven days. On the first day shall be a solemn rest, and on the eighth day shall be a solemn rest.

레위기 23:40.content: You shall take on the first day the fruit of majestic trees, branches of palm trees, and boughs of thick trees, and willows of the brook; and you shall rejoice before Yahweh your God seven days.

레위기 23:41.content: You shall keep it as a feast to Yahweh seven days in the year. It is a statute forever throughout your generations. You shall keep it in the seventh month.

레위기 23:42.content: You shall dwell in temporary shelters for seven days. All who are native-born in Israel shall dwell in temporary shelters,

레위기 23:43.content: that your generations may know that I made the children of Israel to dwell in temporary shelters when I brought them out of the land of Egypt. I am Yahweh your God.’ ”

레위기 23:44.content: So Moses declared to the children of Israel the appointed feasts of Yahweh.
